Date: {{date}}

Dear {{name}},

On behalf of {{company_name}}, we are pleased to issue this formal offer and engagement letter for the role of {{role}} under the {{department}} department. This letter records the approved association basis, role expectations, compliance obligations, verification model, and digital employment record controls applicable to your engagement with the company.

Your appointment is recorded as {{role_context}}. {{timeline_statement}} {{status_statement}} This offer is subject to completion of joining formalities, identity and document verification, background verification where applicable, acceptance of company policies, and continued adherence to professional, information security, confidentiality, and workplace conduct standards.

Reference ID{{reference_id}}
Joining Date{{joining_date}}
Date Of Exit{{exit_date}}
Engagement Duration{{duration}}
Reporting Manager{{manager}}
Lifecycle Status{{status}}
BGV Contact{{bgv_email}}
Verification URL{{verify_url}}

Appointment Basis And Role Scope

You will report to {{manager}} or any other person designated by the company. Your responsibilities will be aligned with the role of {{role}}, the operating requirements of the {{department}} department, and any project, client, internal, or business priorities assigned from time to time. The scope may include planning, execution, documentation, coordination, research, analysis, implementation, testing, review, reporting, learning activities, support work, handover tasks, and responsible participation in company processes.

The company may update responsibilities, reporting lines, work allocation, tools, workflows, work mode, and review mechanisms based on operational needs, business continuity, client requirements, compliance obligations, security controls, or performance development plans. Such updates will not reduce your obligation to perform assigned work professionally, ethically, and within reasonable timelines.

Joining Formalities And Documentation

  • Submit valid identity proof, address proof, education records, experience records if applicable, and any role-specific documents requested by HR or management.
  • Provide accurate contact details, emergency contact information, bank or statutory information if required, and updated profile information throughout the association.
  • Complete onboarding, policy acknowledgement, confidentiality acceptance, access setup, training, induction, and any joining checklist assigned by the company.
  • Ensure all declarations, uploaded documents, and personal information are accurate, current, and not misleading.
  • Notify HR immediately if any submitted record changes, expires, becomes inaccurate, or requires correction.

Performance, Attendance And Professional Conduct

  • Maintain punctuality, attendance discipline, responsiveness, accountability, and professional communication expected for {{role}}.
  • Complete assigned work with care, accuracy, confidentiality, quality ownership, and respect for timelines.
  • Participate in reviews, team discussions, feedback sessions, training, handovers, and knowledge-sharing activities when requested.
  • Respect workplace rules, anti-harassment standards, equal opportunity practices, escalation paths, and professional boundaries.
  • Follow lawful and reasonable instructions issued by {{manager}}, HR, management, or authorized company representatives.

Digital Work, Security And Future-Ready Controls

Company systems, devices, credentials, repositories, files, communication channels, automation tools, AI-assisted tools, collaboration platforms, cloud services, and records must be used only for authorized company work. You must protect passwords, access tokens, files, customer data, employee data, candidate data, project materials, and internal communications from unauthorized access, misuse, transfer, copying, publication, or deletion.

You are expected to follow information security practices including responsible device use, secure storage, access control, phishing awareness, incident reporting, data minimization, and approved retention or deletion instructions. Any suspected breach, loss of device, unauthorized access, policy breach, data leak, or misuse of company resources must be reported immediately.

Confidentiality, Intellectual Property And Data Protection

All business information, technical information, designs, source code, credentials, workflows, client information, employee information, candidate information, pricing, proposals, research, documentation, reports, and any material accessed or created during the association must be treated as confidential unless the company confirms otherwise in writing.

Work products, documents, designs, code, reports, process notes, research, configurations, templates, and deliverables created as part of assigned company work will be handled according to company policy and applicable intellectual property obligations. Confidential information must not be retained, disclosed, copied, published, uploaded externally, transferred, or used outside authorized company work.

Review, Continuation And Completion

The company may review eligibility, submitted documents, verification status, work performance, attendance, conduct, training completion, policy acknowledgement, handover readiness, and business requirements before confirming continuation, completion, certification, experience records, relieving documentation, or any other lifecycle action. {{exit_or_continuation_statement}}

Verification And Digital Record Integrity

{{digital_record_statement}} {{verification_statement}} Any third-party verification must quote the reference number printed in this letter and must be performed only for a legitimate purpose. Alteration, selective extraction, unauthorized reproduction, or misuse of this document may make the record unverifiable.

Please confirm acceptance of this offer in writing and complete all requested joining formalities before the joining date. Acceptance of this letter confirms that you understand the role, reporting structure, professional obligations, confidentiality requirements, verification process, and company policy expectations stated in this document.

We welcome you to {{company_name}} and look forward to a productive, ethical, secure, and professionally meaningful association.
